questions.question: У«?$X_1, \cdots, X_6$ Тў»ТЮЦУЄфТђ╗СйЊ $N(0,1)$ уџёТаиТю? $Y=\left(X_1+X_2+X_3\right)^2+\left(X_4+X_5+X_6\right)^2$, тѕЎСй┐ $C Y$ ТюЇС╗ј $\chi^2$ тѕєтИЃуџётИИТЋ?$C$ СИ?() .
questions.analysis:
тЏаСИ║ $X_1+X_2+X_3 \sim N(0,3), X_4+X_5+X_6 \sim N(0,3)$, СИћуЏИС║њуІгуФ?ТЅђС╗?$\frac{X_1+X_2+X_3}{\sqrt{3}} \sim N(0,1), \frac{X_4+X_5+X_6}{\sqrt{3}} \sim N(0,1)$, С║јТў» $\left(\frac{X_1+X_2+X_3}{\sqrt{3}}\right)^2+\left(\frac{X_4+X_5+X_6}{\sqrt{3}}\right)^2 \sim \chi^2(2)$.
ТЋЁт║ћтЈ?$C=\frac{1}{3}$, тЇ?$\frac{1}{3} Y \sim \chi^2(2)$.

questions.question: УІ?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_9$ Тў»ТЮЦУЄфТђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N\left(0,2^2\right)$ уџёу«ђтЇЋжџЈТю║ТаиТю? тѕЎСй┐ $Q=a\left(X_1+X_2\right)^2+b\left(X_3+X_4+X_5\right)^2+c\left(X_6+X_7+X_8+X_9\right)^2$ТюЇС╗ј $\chi^2$ тѕєтИЃуџёу│╗ТЋ?$a, b, c$ тѕєтѕФСИ?().
questions.analysis:
ућ▒С║ј $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_9$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІСИћтЈќУЄфТђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N\left(0,2^2\right)$, ућ▒ТГБТђЂтѕєтИЃуџёу║┐ТђДУ┐љу«ЌТђДУ┤еТюЅ
$$
X_1+X_2 \sim N(0,8), \quad X_3+X_4+X_5 \sim N(0,12), \quad X_6+X_7+X_8+X_9 \sim N(0,16),
$$

С║јТў», ућ?$\chi^2=\chi_1^2+\cdots+\chi_k^2$, ТюЅ
$$
Q=\frac{\left(X_1+X_2\right)^2}{8}+\frac{\left(X_3+X_4+X_5\right)^2}{12}+\frac{\left(X_6+X_7+X_8+X_9\right)^2}{16} \sim \chi^2(3),
$$

ТЋ?$a=1 / 8, b=1 / 12, c=1 / 16$.

questions.question: У«ЙТђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N(0,1), X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ СИ║ТаиТю? тѕЎСИІтѕЌу╗ЊУ«║жћЎУ»»уџёТў?( ).
questions.analysis:
УІ?$X \sim N(0,1), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$T=\frac{X}{\sqrt{Y / n}} \sim t(n)$;
УІ?$X \sim \chi^2(m), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$F=\frac{X / m}{Y / n} \sim F(m, n)$.
$X_1-X_2 \sim N(0,2), X_3^2+X_4^2 \sim \chi^2(2)$, СИћуЏИС║њуІгуФ? ТЅђС╗?$\frac{X_1-X_2}{\sqrt{X_3^2+X_4^2}}=\frac{\left(X_1-X_2\right) / \sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{\left(X_3^2+X_4^2\right) / 2}} \sim t(2)$.
$X_1+X_2 \sim N(0,2), X_1^2+X_2^2 \sim \chi^2(2)$, СйєСИЇуЏИС║њуІгуФІ, ТЅђС╗ЦСИЇУЃйУ»┤Тў?$\frac{X_1+X_2}{\sqrt{X_1^2+X_2^2}}=\frac{\left(X_1+X_2\right) / \sqrt{2}}{\sqrt{\left(X_1^2+X_2^2\right) / 2}}$ ТюЇС╗ј $t(2)$.
$X_1 \sim N(0,1), \sum_{i=2}^n X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1)$, СИћуЏИС║њуІгуФ? ТЅђС╗?$\frac{\sqrt{n-1} X_1}{\sqrt{\sum_{i=2}^n X_i^2}}=\frac{X_1 / 1}{\sqrt{\sum_{i=2}^n X_i^2 /(n-1)}} \sim t(n-1)$.
$\sum_{i=1}^3 X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(3), \sum_{i=4}^n X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(n-3)$, СИћуЏИС║њуІгуФ? ТЅђС╗?$\frac{(n-3) \sum_{i=1}^3 X_i^2}{3 \sum_{i=4}^n X_i^2}=\frac{\sum_{i=1}^3 X_i^2 / 3}{\sum_{i=4}^n X_i^2 /(n-3)} \sim F(3, n-3)$.

questions.question: У«?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_7$ тЈќУЄфТГБТђЂТђ╗СйЊ $N\left(0,0.4^2\right)$, тѕ?$P\left\{\sum_{i=1}^7 X_i^2>1.92\right\}=() .\left(\chi_{0.1}^2(7)=12, \chi_{0.025}^2(7)=16\right)$
questions.analysis: $\begin{aligned} & \text { ућ?} \frac{\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\mu\right)^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(n), \mu=0, \sigma^2=0.4^2 \text {, тЙ?} \\ & \quad P\left\{\sum_{i=1}^7 X_i^2>1.92\right\}=P\left\{\frac{\sum_{i=1}^7 X_i^2}{(0.4)^2}>\frac{1.92}{(0.4)^2}\right\}=P\left\{\chi^2(7)>12\right\}=0.1 .\end{aligned}$

ућ▒С║ј $X-2 \sim N(0,1), Y_i / 2 \sim N(0,1), i=1,2,3,4$, ТЋЁућ▒ $t$ тѕєтИЃуџёт«џС╣ЅуЪЦ
$$
T=\frac{4(X-2)}{\sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^4 Y_i^2}}=\frac{X-2}{\sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^4\left(\frac{Y_i}{4}\right)^2}}=\frac{X-2}{\sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^4\left(\frac{Y_i}{2}\right)^2 / 4}} \sim t(4) .
$$

questions.question: ти▓уЪЦ $X \sim t(n)$, тѕЎТюЅ () .
questions.analysis:
У«?$X=U / \sqrt{\frac{Y}{n}}$, тЁХСИГ $U \sim N(0,1), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$. СИ?$U$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, С║јТў»,
$$
U^2 \sim \chi^2(1),
$$

СИ?$U^2$ СИ?$Y$ С╣ЪуЏИС║њуІгуФ? ТЅђС╗Ц
$$
X^2=U^2 /\left(\frac{Y}{n}\right) \sim F(1, n), \frac{1}{X^2} \sim F(n, 1) .
$$

questions.question: У«?$T \sim t(n)$, тѕ?$T^2 \sim()$.
questions.analysis: 1. УІ?$X \sim N(0,1), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$t \sim t(n)$, тЁХСИГ $t=\frac{X}{\sqrt{Y / n}}$; 2. УІ?$X \sim \chi^2(m), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$F \sim F(m, n)$, тЁХСИГ $F=\frac{X / m}{Y / n}=\frac{n X}{m Y}$;тй?$m=1$ ТЌ? Тю?$F(1, n)=t^2(n)$.

questions.question: У«?$X_1, X_2, X_3, X_4$ Тў»тЈќУЄфТГБТђЂТђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N\left(0,2^2\right)$ уџёу«ђтЇЋжџЈТю║ТаиТю? $Y=a\left(2 X_1-X_2\right)^2+b\left(4 X_3-3 X_4\right)^2$, тѕЎСй┐ $Y$ ТюЇС╗ј $\chi^2$ тѕєтИЃуџ?$a, b$ СИјтѕєтИЃуџёУЄфућ▒т║дСИ║ ( ).
questions.analysis:
тЏаСИ║ $X_i \sim N\left(0,2^2\right)(i=1,2,3,4)$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, ТЅђС╗?$2 X_1-X_2 \sim N(0,20), 4 X_3-3 X_4 \sim N(0,100)$,
$$
\left(\frac{2 X_1-X_2}{\sqrt{20}}\right)^2+\left(\frac{4 X_3-3 X_4}{\sqrt{100}}\right)^2 \sim \chi^2(2)
$$

тЏаТГцтй?$a=\frac{1}{20}, b=\frac{1}{100}$ ТЌ? $Y \sim \chi^2(2)$, УЄфућ▒т║дСИ║ 2 .

questions.question: У«?$X_1, X_2, X_3, X_4$ Тў»ТЮЦУЄфТГБТђЂТђ╗СйЊ $\mathrm{N}\left(0, \sigma^2\right)$ уџёТаиТю? У«?$V=\frac{\sqrt{3} X_1}{\sqrt{X_2^2+X_3^2+X_4^2}}$, тѕ?$V \sim()$.
questions.analysis:
тЏаСИ║ $\frac{X_1}{\sigma} \sim N(0,1), \frac{X_2^2+X_3^2+X_4^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(3)$, СИћт«ЃС╗гС║њуЏИуІгуФ? жѓБС╣ѕућ?$t$ тѕєтИЃт«џС╣ЅтЈ»уЪЦ,
$$
V=\frac{\frac{X_1}{\sigma}}{\sqrt{\frac{X_2^2+X_3^2+X_4^2}{3 \sigma^2}}}=\frac{\sqrt{3} X_1}{\sqrt{X_2^2+X_3^2+X_4^2}} \sim t(3) .
$$

questions.question: У«ЙжџЈТю║тЈўжЄ?$\xi \sim N(0,1), \eta \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$\xi$ СИ?$\eta$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$T=\xi / \sqrt{\eta / n}$ ТюЇС╗ј ( ).
questions.analysis: УІ?$X \sim N(0,1), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$t \sim t(n)$, тЁХСИГ $t=\frac{X}{\sqrt{Y / n}}$.

questions.question: У«ЙТђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N(0,4)$, Уђ?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_{15}$ СИ║тЈќУЄфУ»ЦТђ╗СйЊуџёТаиТю? жЌ«жџЈТю║тЈўжЄ?$Y=\frac{X_1^2+X_2^2+\cdots+X_{10}^2}{2\left(X_{11}^2+X_{12}^2+\cdots+X_{15}^2\right)}$ ТюЇС╗јуџётѕєтИЃТў» () .
УІЦжџЈТю║тЈўжЄ?$X$ ТюЇС╗ј $F\left(n_1, n_2\right)$ уџётѕєтИ? тѕЎТюЅ ( ).
questions.analysis:
(1) тЏажџЈТю║тЈўжЄ?$X$ ТюЇС╗ј $F\left(n_1, n_2\right)$, ТЋЁтЈ»У«?$X=\frac{U / n_1}{V / n_2}$, тЁХСИГ $U$ ТюЇС╗ј $\chi^2\left(n_1\right), V$ ТюЇС╗ј $\chi^2\left(n_2\right)$, СИ?$U$ СИ?$V$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, ТЋЁ
$$
Y=\frac{1}{X}=\frac{V / n_2}{U / n_1} \sim F\left(n_2, n_1\right) .
$$
(2) $F$ тѕєтИЃуџётѕєСйЇТЋ░тЁиТюЅуџёТђДУ┤е: $F_{1-\alpha}\left(n_1, n_2\right)=\frac{1}{F_\alpha\left(n_2, n_1\right)}$.

questions.question: У«ЙжџЈТю║тЈўжЄ?$X$ тњ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІСИћжЃйТюЇС╗јТГБТђЂтѕєтИ?$N\left(0,3^2\right)$. $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_9$ тњ?$Y_1, Y_2, \cdots, Y_9$ Тў»тѕєтѕФтЈќУЄфТђ╗СйЊ $X$ тњ?$Y$ уџёу«ђтЇЋжџЈТю║ТаиТю? тѕЎу╗ЪУ«АжЄЈ $T=\frac{X_1+X_2+\cdots+X_9}{\sqrt{Y_1^2+Y_2^2+\cdots+Y_9^2}}$ ТюЇС╗јУЄфућ▒т║дСИ║ ( ) уџ?$t$ тѕєтИЃ.
questions.analysis:
ждќтЁѕт░?$X_i, Y_i$ тѕєтѕФжЎцС╗Ц 3, Сй┐С╣ІтїќСИ║ТаЄтЄєТГБТђЂтѕєтИ?
С╗?$X_i^{\prime}=\frac{X_i}{3}, Y_i^{\prime}=\frac{Y_i}{3} (i=1,2, \cdots, 9)$, тѕЎ
$$
X_i^{\prime} \sim N(0,1), \quad Y_i^{\prime} \sim N(0,1)
$$
тєЇС╗ц $X^{\prime}=X_1^{\prime}+X_2^{\prime}+\cdots+X_9^{\prime}$, тѕ?$X^{\prime} \sim N(0,9)$, С╗јУђ?$\frac{X^{\prime}}{3} \sim N(0,1)$.
тЈѕС╗ц $Y^{\prime 2}=Y_1^{\prime 2}+Y_2^{\prime 2}+\cdots+Y_{9}^{\prime 2}$, тѕ?$Y^{\prime 2} \sim \chi^2(9)$.
тЏаТГц
$$
T=\frac{X_1+X_2+\cdots+X_9}{\sqrt{Y_1^2+Y_2^2+\cdots+Y_9^2}}=\frac{3(X_1^{\prime}+X_2^{\prime}+\cdots+X_9^{\prime})}{\sqrt{3^2(Y_1^{\prime 2}+Y_2^{\prime 2}+\cdots+Y_9^{\prime 2})}}=\frac{X^{\prime}}{\sqrt{Y^{\prime 2}}}=\frac{X^{\prime} / 3}{\sqrt{Y^{\prime 2} / 9}} \sim t(9)
$$
У┐ЎжЄїтѕЕућеС║?$X^{\prime}$ СИ?$Y^{\prime 2}$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ.

ућ▒С║ј $X-2 \sim N(0,1), \quad Y_i / 2 \sim N(0,1), i=1, 2, 3, 4$, ТЋЁућ▒ $t$ тѕєтИЃуџёт«џС╣ЅуЪЦ
$$
T=\frac{X-2}{\sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^4\left(\frac{Y_i}{2}\right)^2} / 4}=\frac{4(X-2)}{\sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^4 Y_i^2}} \sim t(4),
$$

ућ?$P\left\{|T|>t_0\right\}=0.01$, т»╣С║ј $n=4, \alpha=0.01, t_0=t_{\alpha / 2}=t_{0.005}(4)=4.6041$.

questions.question: жђЅжА╣СИЇТГБуА«уџёТў?( ).
questions.analysis: УІ?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІСИћжЃйТюЇС╗јТаЄтЄєТГБТђЂтѕєтИ? тѕ?$Y=X_1^2+X_2^2+\cdots+X_n^2 \sim \chi^2(n), E(Y)=n, D(Y)=2 n$.жђЅжА╣" УІ?$X \sim \chi^2\left(n_1\right), \quad Y \sim \chi^2\left(n_2\right)$, тѕ?$X+Y \sim \chi^2\left(n_1+n_2\right)$ "Тў»жћЎУ»»уџё, тЏаСИ║у╝║С╣Ј $X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІУ┐ЎСИфТЮАС╗Х.

choices.choice: УІ?$X \sim N(0,1), Y \sim N(0,1)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$X^2+Y^2 \sim \chi^2(2)$

questions.question: $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ СИ║Тђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N(0,1)$ уџёСИђСИфТаиТю? $\bar{X}$ СИ║ТаиТюгтЮЄтђ? $S^2$ СИ║ТаиТюгТќ╣ти? тѕЎТюЅ ( ).
questions.analysis:
т»╣С║јТГБТђЂТђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N(0,1)$ тЈітЁХТаиТюг $X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$, Та╣ТЇ«уЏИтЁ│у╗ЊУ«║ТюЅ
$$
\frac{\bar{X}-0}{1 / \sqrt{n}} \sim N(0,1), \frac{\sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2}{1^2} \sim \chi^2(n-1), \frac{\bar{X}-0}{S / \sqrt{n}} \sim t(n-1) .
$$

тЈѕТа╣ТЇ?$\chi^2$ тѕєтИЃуџёт«џС╣? Тю?$X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(1), \sum_{i=2}^n X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(n-1)$, СИћуЏИС║њуІгуФ? С║јТў»ућ?$F$ тѕєтИЃуџёт«џС╣? ТюЅ
$$
\frac{(n-1) X_1^2}{\sum_{i=2}^n X_i^2} \sim F(1, n-1)
$$

questions.question: У«ЙжџЈТю║тЈўжЄ?$X \sim N(\mu, 1), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$X, Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ. С╗?$T=\frac{X-\mu}{\sqrt{Y}} \sqrt{n}$, тѕЎСИІтѕЌу╗ЊУ«║ТГБуА«уџёТў?( ).
questions.analysis: тЏаСИ║ $X \sim N(\mu, 1), Y \sim \chi^2(n)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, ТЅђС╗?$\frac{X-\mu}{\sqrt{Y / n}} \sim t(n)$, тЇ?$T=\frac{X-\mu}{\sqrt{Y}} \sqrt{n} \sim t(n)$.

questions.question: У«?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_{28}$ тЈќУЄфТГБТђЂТђ╗СйЊ $N\left(0,0.3^2\right)$, тѕ?$P\left\{\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{14} X_i}{\sqrt{\sum_{j=15}^{28} X_j^2}}>2.1448\right\}=() .\left(t_{0.01}(14)=2.6245, t_{0.025}(14)=2.1448\right)$.
questions.analysis:
тЏаСИ║Тђ╗СйЊСИ?$N\left(0, \sigma^2\right)$, ТЅђС╗?$\sum_{i=1}^{14} X_i \sim N\left(0,0.3^2 n\right), \sum_{j=15}^{28} \frac{X_j^2}{0.3^2} \sim \chi^2(14)$ тЈ?$\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{14} X_i}{\sqrt{\sum_{j=15}^{28} X_j^2}} \sim t(14)$, С║јТў»
$$
P\left\{\frac{\sum_{i=1}^{14} X_i}{\sqrt{\sum_{j=15}^{28} X_j^2}}>2.1448\right\}=0.025
$$

questions.question: тюеСИІтѕЌу╗ЊТъюСИГСИЇТГБуА«уџёТў?( ).

choices.choice: УІ?$X \sim N(0,1), Y \sim N(0,1)$, СИ?$X$ СИ?$Y$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, тѕ?$X^2+Y^2 \sim \chi^2(2)$

УІ?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_n$ Тў»ТЮЦУЄ?$X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ уџёТаиТю? тѕ?$E\left(\frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2\right)=n-1, D\left(\frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^n\left(X_i-\bar{X}\right)^2\right)=2 n-2$

questions.question: У«?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_9$ Тў»тЈќУЄфТГБТђЂТђ╗СйЊ $X \sim N\left(\mu, \sigma^2\right)$ уџёТаиТю? СИ?$Y_1=\frac{1}{6}\left(X_1+X_2+\cdots+X_6\right), Y_2=\frac{1}{3}\left(X_7+X_8+X_9\right)$, $S^2=\frac{1}{2} \sum_{i=7}^9\left(X_i-Y_2\right)^2$, тѕ?$Z=\frac{\sqrt{2}\left(Y_1-Y_2\right)}{S} \sim t(\quad)$.
questions.analysis:
ТўЊуЪЦ
$$
Y_1=\frac{1}{6}(X_1+\cdots+X_6) \sim N\left(\mu, \frac{\sigma^2}{6}\right), \quad Y_2=\frac{1}{3}(X_7+\cdots+X_9) \sim N\left(\mu, \frac{\sigma^2}{3}\right)
$$
СИ?$Y_1$ СИ?$Y_2$ уІгуФІ№╝їТЋЁ $Y_1-Y_2 \sim N\left(0, \frac{\sigma^2}{2}\right)$сђѓтЈѕ
$$
\frac{2S^2}{\sigma^2}=\frac{1}{\sigma^2}\sum_{i=7}^9(X_i-Y_2)^2 \sim \chi^2(2)
$$
тЏаСИ║ $Y_1-Y_2$ СИ?$\frac{2S^2}{\sigma^2}$ уІгуФІ№╝їС╗јУђї
$$
Z = \frac{\sqrt{2}(Y_1-Y_2)}{S} = \frac{(Y_1-Y_2) / (\sigma/\sqrt{2})}{\sqrt{\frac{2S^2}{\sigma^2} / 2}} \sim t(2)
$$

questions.question: У«?$X_1, X_2, \cdots, X_{20}$ Тў»ТГБТђЂТђ╗СйЊ $N\left(0, \sigma^2\right)$ уџёТаиТю? тѕЎСИІтѕЌу╗ЊУ«║ТГБуА«уџёТў?( ).
questions.analysis:
тЏаСИ║Тђ╗СйЊСИ?$N\left(0, \sigma^2\right)$, ТЅђС╗?$\sum_{i=1}^9 X_i \sim N\left(0,9 \sigma^2\right), \frac{1}{\sigma} \sum_{i=1}^{20} X_i \sim N(0,20), \frac{X_i^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2(1)(i=1,2, \cdots, n)$ уЏИС║њуІгуФІтЈ?$\frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^n X_i^2 \sim \chi^2(n)$, С║јТў»
$$
\frac{11}{9} \frac{\sum_{i=1}^9 X_i^2}{\sum_{j=10}^{20} X_j^2} \sim F(9,11), \frac{\frac{1}{3 \sigma} \sum_{i=1}^9 X_i}{\frac{1}{\sqrt{11} \sigma} \sqrt{\sum_{j=10}^{20} X_j^2}} \sim t(11)
$$

$\begin{aligned} & \text { тЏаСИ║ } \frac{\sum_{j=1}^{n_i}\left(X_{i j}-\overline{X_i}\right)^2}{\sigma^2}=\frac{\left(n_i-1\right) S_i^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2\left(n_i-1\right) \text {, СИ?} \frac{\left(n_i-1\right) S_i^2}{\sigma^2}(i=1,2, \cdots, k) \text { уЏИС║њуІгуФІ, ТЅђС╗?} \\ & W=\frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^k \sum_{j=1}^{n_i}\left(X_{i j}-\overline{X_i}\right)^2=\sum_{i=1}^k \frac{\left(n_i-1\right) S_i^2}{\sigma^2} \sim \chi^2\left(\sum_{i=1}^k\left(n_i-1\right)\right) . \\ & \text { Уђ?} \sum_{i=1}^k\left(n_i-1\right)=\sum_{i=1}^k n_i-k=n-k \text {, ТЋ?} \\ & W=\frac{1}{\sigma^2} \sum_{i=1}^k \sum_{j=1}^{n_i}\left(X_{i j}-\overline{X_i}\right)^2 \sim \chi^2(n-k) .\end{aligned}$

questions.analysis:
тЏаСИ║ТаЄтЄєТГБТђЂтѕєтИЃтњї $t$ тѕєтИЃуџёт»єт║дтЄйТЋ░тЏЙтйбжЃйТў»тЁ│С║?$y$ Уй┤т»╣уД░уџё№╝їТЅђС╗?$z_{1-a}(n)=-z_a(n), t_{1-a}(n)=-t_a(n)$№╝?\chi^2$ тЈўжЄЈСИЇтЈќт░ЈС║јжЏХуџётђ╝№╝їТЅђС╗?$\chi_{1-a}^2(n)=-\chi_a^2(n)$ Тў»жћЎуџёсђѓт»╣С║?$F$ тѕєтИЃ№╝?$F$ тѕєтИЃуџётѕєСйЇТЋ░тЁиТюЅуџёТђДУ┤е№╝џ
$$F_{1-a}(n_1, n_2)=\frac{1}{F_a(n_2, n_1)}$$
